system.description:
### Tier 1 Horde (4/HP) Small, acid-spitting insectoid creatures that swarm targets in a chaotic wave of claws and toxins. Motives & Tactics: Swarm, overwhelm

#### Features Horde (1d4+1) - Passive: When the Rachni Worker have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.

Toxic Burst - Action: Some of the workers explode to protect the group. Mark one HP, then all targets in Melee range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 1d20+3 direct phy damage.

Volatile Acid - Reaction: When the Rachni worker takes physical damage, PCs in Melee range must mark 1 Stress from the resulting acid spray.

}}
